programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: Minnesota Twins face Toronto Blue Jays in a regular-season baseball matchup at Target Field. This is the final contest of a four-game set. Minnesota won the April series 2-1 following an 8-2 victory in their last meeting in a game of three series.

programme.desc: A look at the top plays and moments from the past week in baseball.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning host the Canadiens for a decisive Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round. Both teams recorded 106 points in the regular season. Tampa Bay forced this Game 7 with an overtime victory to avoid elimination in Game 6.

programme.title: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Cavaliers host the Raptors for a winner-take-all Game 7. RJ Barrett forced the decider with an OT three-pointer to secure a 112-110 Game 6 win. The Cavs look to stay perfect as they enter with a 10-0 all-time playoff home record against Toronto.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned following the final round of the PGA Tour signature event in Miami. The field must survive the daunting par-4 18th hole at Trump National Doral to secure the prestigious title and claim a lucrative multimillion-dollar payout.

programme.title: Park the Bus
programme.desc: TSN Soccer's Kevin Kilbane and Steven Caldwell discuss the world of soccer as Canada prepares to host the FIFA Men's World Cup in 2026.

programme.desc: From Starlight Stadium in Langford, British Columbia.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Detroit Tigers host the Texas Rangers to conclude a three-game series at Comerica Park. Josh Jung leads Texas with a .317 batting average against Detroit's Kevin McGonigle with an average of .333. Jack Leiter is the projected starter for Texas.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: The grid takes on the 19-turn Miami International Autodrome for 57 laps of racing. Mercedes leads the way as rookie Kimi Antonelli seeks to extend his 9-point lead over George Russell. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc looks to close the gap in Florida.

programme.title: SC
programme.desc: Features the top 100 catches of all-time.

programme.title: NWSL Soccer
programme.desc: Chicago Stars FC battle Portland Thorns FC in an NWSL match at Northwestern Medicine Field. Portland holds a 3-1-1 advantage over the last five meetings after playing Chicago to a hard-fought 1-1 draw during their previous clash in September 2025.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Series Prerace
programme.desc: Featuring the latest news, highlights and interviews.

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: The Cup Series visits the 1.5-mile Texas oval. Denny Hamlin looks to secure his third victory of the season. Following a top-5 finish at Talladega, Alex Bowman seeks to navigate the high banks of turns 1 and 2 to reach the winner's circle.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: The Detroit Tigers host the Texas Rangers to conclude a three-game series at Comerica Park. Josh Jung leads Texas with a .317 batting average against Detroit's Kevin McGonigle with an average of .333. Jack Leiter is the projected starter for Texas.

programme.desc: TSN's flagship show providing news, highlights, analysis and interviews from the world of sports.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned following the final round of the PGA Tour signature event in Miami. The field must survive the daunting par-4 18th hole at Trump National Doral to secure the prestigious title and claim a lucrative multimillion-dollar payout.

programme.title: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: The Pistons host the Magic for Game 7 of the Eastern Conference quarterfinals. Detroit staved off elimination in Game 6 by overcoming a 24-point deficit, the largest road comeback by a team facing elimination since the 1996-97 season.

programme.title: NBA Basketball
programme.desc: Western Conference First Round, Game 7. (If necessary)

programme.title: FIA Formula E World Championship Racing
programme.desc: The grid battles high-grip concrete of the 15-turn Tempelhof circuit. Drivers must manage high tire wear over 1.45 miles of racing. Following a podium finish in 2025, Mitch Evans looks for a victory to propel Jaguar up the 2026 championship table.

programme.title: SportsCentre
programme.desc: TSN's flagship show providing news, highlights, analysis and interviews from the world of sports.

programme.title: PBR Bull Riding
programme.desc: Coverage of classic bull riding events from around the United States.

programme.title: F1 Grand Prix Sunday
programme.desc: Featuring pre-race predictions and analysis leading up to today's Formula 1 racing action.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: The grid takes on the 19-turn Miami International Autodrome for 57 laps of racing. Mercedes leads the way as rookie Kimi Antonelli seeks to extend his 9-point lead over George Russell. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc looks to close the gap in Florida.

programme.title: F1 Chequered Flag
programme.desc: Post-race analysis of F1 races.

programme.title: Hockey LNH
programme.desc: Les Hurricanes de la Caroline accueillent les Flyers de Philadelphie pour le premier match du deuxième tour de l'Association de l'Est.

programme.desc: Couverture des plus grandes courses de la saison du championnat FIA de Formule E.

programme.title: L'académie du guide de l'auto
programme.desc: Anick Dumontet ne donne aucune chance à Naadei Lyonnais à bord de la Volvo EX-30, présentée par Antoine Joubert; ensuite, place à l'aventure avec Anaïs Favron.

programme.title: 50 ans de sports
programme.desc: On nous fait revivre les plus grands moments du sport de chaque année.

programme.title: Baseball MLB
programme.desc: Les Twins du Minnesota affrontent les Blue Jays de Toronto lors d'un match de baseball de saison régulière au Target Field. Il s'agit du dernier match d'une série de quatre rencontres.

programme.title: Jeux de la semaine MLB
programme.desc: Une présentation des matchs de la Ligue majeure de baseball.
